blended.narrative: Lost Trail is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
